message:
You know that one friend who seems a bit *too* ready for everything? Yep, that’s me. Last winter, when the forecast hinted at a big snowstorm, I went all out. I stocked up on non-perishables, filled the bathtub with water, and even pulled out those old board games from the attic. My family teased me, but when the snow started falling, we were snug as bugs inside, sipping hot cocoa and playing Monopoly like it was the best thing ever. 🌨️

Turns out, being a little over-prepared isn’t such a bad thing after all—it gave us a cozy day together instead of a scramble for supplies. If nothing else, I’m now the proud owner of the largest collection of board games in the neighborhood! 

Has anyone else found themselves in the gloriously over-prepared camp? What’s your go-to prep item for stormy weather?  P.S. This little refresher helped me keep track of everything!
